lineage_payloads.lesson_text: ACTION: SEASON. Mechanism label: AMPLIFICATION. A small input gains strength through propagation, magnifies into a cascade, and escalates downstream. Season behavior-protocol pond with AMPLIFICATION.
ACTION: SEASON. Mechanism label: AMPLIFICATION. A relay increases signal gain so each stage produces stronger output. Season behavior-protocol pond with AMPLIFICATION.
ACTION: SEASON. Mechanism label: BUFFERING. A buffer absorbs shock, uses reserve capacity, and delays visible failure while demand is smoothed. Season behavior-protocol pond with BUFFERING.
